title: Climate Change Policy Analysts
description: Research and analyze policy developments related to climate change. Make climate-related recommendations for actions such as legislation, awareness campaigns, or fundraising approaches.

tasks.text: Provide analytical support for policy briefs related to renewable energy, energy efficiency, or climate change.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Propose new or modified policies involving use of traditional and alternative fuels, transportation of goods, and other factors relating to climate and climate change.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare study reports, memoranda, briefs, testimonies, or other written materials to inform government or environmental groups on environmental issues, such as climate change.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze and distill climate-related research findings to inform legislators, regulatory agencies, or other stakeholders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Make legislative recommendations related to climate change or environmental management, based on climate change policies, principles, programs, practices, and processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present climate-related information at public interest, governmental, or other meetings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Gather and review climate-related studies from government agencies, research laboratories, and other organizations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review existing policies or legislation to identify environmental impacts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Promote initiatives to mitigate climate change with government or environmental groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research policies, practices, or procedures for climate or environmental management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write reports or academic papers to communicate findings of climate-related studies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop, or contribute to the development of, educational or outreach programs on the environment or climate change.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present and defend proposals for climate change research projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare grant applications to obtain funding for programs related to climate change, environmental management, or sustainability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
